message:
fix(clippy): resolve 9 warnings in policy governance modules

- forensic_export: sort_by → sort_by_key for both asc/desc timestamp sorts
- forensic_export: allow unused_self on export_csv (intentional method)
- policy_audit_chain: clone → clone_from for efficient string assignment
- policy_compliance: needless collect → direct count for period_violations
- policy_metrics: 3x manual checked division → checked_div, remove unnecessary u64 cast

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
